summary: Packaged opencode-discord-bot as a buildPythonApplication (packages/opencode-discord-bot.nix, callPackage'd directly in modules/system/optional/discord-bot.nix), fixed SessionStore's read-only-nix-store write hazard via a SESSION_STORE_PATH env var backed by a systemd StateDirectory, repointed discord-bot's ExecStart at the built console script (dropping PYTHONPATH), fixed a stale comment path typo, and untracked root opencode.json. Verified with a successful nixos-rebuild build --flake .#nandi and a byte-for-byte nix eval pre/post comparison of discord-bot's serviceConfig confirming the store-path ExecStart, absent PYTHONPATH, and present SESSION_STORE_PATH/StateDirectory. A live nixos-rebuild switch on nandi is documented as an Outstanding Manual Step (sudo/SSH sandbox-denied here).

artifacts.summary: Added session_store_path Config field + SESSION_STORE_PATH env read
New PEP 621 packaging metadata with opencode-discord-bot console-script entry point
New buildPythonApplication derivation (first in this repo); header comment documents deferred own-repo extraction
opencodeDiscordBot callPackage binding, repointed ExecStart, dropped PYTHONPATH, added SESSION_STORE_PATH + StateDirectory, fixed comment typo
Refreshed Python Packaging section, Files table, discord-bot.service block, and Rollback binding name to match the packaged wiring; added future own-repo-extraction note
Implementation summary with nix eval pre/post evidence, closure delta, and Outstanding Manual Step

completion_data.completion_summary: Packaged opencode-discord-bot as a buildPythonApplication callPackage'd directly in discord-bot.nix, fixed the SessionStore read-only-nix-store write hazard via SESSION_STORE_PATH + systemd StateDirectory, repointed the discord-bot ExecStart at the nix-store binary (dropping PYTHONPATH), and untracked root opencode.json. Verified via a successful nandi build and nix eval pre/post evidence; live nixos-rebuild switch on nandi remains an Outstanding Manual Step (sandbox-denied here).

next_steps: Outstanding Manual Step: a human with SSH/sudo to nandi must run `sudo nixos-rebuild switch --flake .#nandi`, confirm via `systemctl cat discord-bot.service` + `journalctl -u discord-bot.service`, and optionally migrate ~/.dotfiles/opencode-discord-bot/data/sessions.json to /var/lib/discord-bot/sessions.json (or accept a clean slate). Note: discord-bot.service is separately crash-looping on hamsa from an unrelated pre-existing asyncio bug, out of scope for this task.
